summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trail Test
description: Validate that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: Verify system compliance with FDA Part 11 and ISO 9001 requirements for security and data integrity.
prerequisites: System must be configured to use AES-256 encryption
Audit trail feature must be enabled

test_steps.description: Enter a new patient record into the system
Inspect the stored patient data to verify it is encrypted with AES-256
Perform an action that triggers a database change (e.g. update patient record)
Verify that the system stores an audit trail for the database change

expected_result: Data is encrypted with AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
test_data: Sample patient data (e.g. name, date of birth, medical history)
acceptance_criteria: System must encrypt patient data using AES-256
System must store audit trails for every database change
